taxonomy_v3: Management and Executive, Business and Strategic Management, Business Analyst
core_skills: Salesforce, Excel, Google Sheets, Data analysis, Data visualization
skill_match_scores: Salesforce:0.0, Excel:1.0, Google Sheets:1.0, Data analysis:1.0, Data visualization:1.0
must_have_quals: Willingness to work in our Midtown Manhattan office 3 days a week, 0–2 years of experience (internships or academic projects in business analysis, data analysis, or similar fields are welcome), Bachelor's degree in Business, Economics, Information Systems, or a related field preferred, Familiarity with Salesforce, or a willingness to learn quickly, Working knowledge of Excel and/or Google Sheets (e.g., pivot tables, basic formulas, data organization), Comfortable working with data and learning how to interpret and present it clearly, Strong problem-solving mindset with a willingness to ask questions and learn new tools, Good organizational and time management skills; able to handle multiple tasks with direction, Clear and professional communication skills, both written and verbal
preferred_quals: Exposure to data visualization tools (e.g., Tableau) through coursework or internships, Experience working on team projects involving data analysis or reporting, Interest in emerging technologies, including AI tools and automation
core_responsibilities: Support the creation and maintenance of Salesforce reports and dashboards based on stakeholder needs, Assist in building “dashboard-style” reporting in Excel and Google Sheets, including combining and organizing data from multiple sources, Help monitor Salesforce usage to identify data quality issues and support teams in improving accuracy and consistency, Perform basic Salesforce tasks such as data entry, record updates, and supporting ongoing operational workflows, Contribute to process improvement initiatives by gathering data, documenting workflows, and supporting implementation efforts, Assist in preparing presentations and slide decks by organizing data, creating visuals, and summarizing key insights, Support testing and evaluation of new tools and systems (including AI add-ons), documenting findings and helping with rollout efforts, Manage multiple tasks and requests with guidance, prioritizing effectively and communicating timelines clearly, Collaborate with cross-functional stakeholders to gather requirements and provide updates on work progress
job_summary: Dow Jones is a global leader in news and information, seeking a Business Analyst to support their Global Business Operations Team. The role involves turning business questions into insights, maintaining Salesforce dashboards, and assisting with data quality and system usage.
